section_name: Expenditure of Grants or Gifts of Money
text: The department may not spend a grant or money given to the department unless the expenditure is authorized by order of the commission.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.058 — Expenditure of Grants or Gifts of Money

The department may not spend a grant or money given to the department unless the expenditure is authorized by order of the commission.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department may not spend a grant or money given to the department unless the expenditure is authorized by order of the commission.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
